reviews.comment:
Tiene un precio en el cartel de entrada y otro diferente y mayor del otro lado cuando ya cargaste... No me resultó agradable, vió??!!!

(Translated by Google)
It has one price on the entrance sign and a different, higher price on the other side once you've loaded up... I didn't find that pleasant, you know?!
